summary: Completed backend + frontend regression for password-page relocation, forgot-password OTP flow, WhatsApp settings/queue-history, review/revision actions, resubmission under late rules, login/register/change-password continuity, and mobile usability.
action_items: Optional quality improvement: resolve React Hook exhaustive-deps warnings in src/App.js (loadAll/loadStudent).
critical_code_review_comments: No blocking functional defects found in requested scope.
Frontend production build passes but still emits two non-blocking eslint react-hooks/exhaustive-deps warnings.
seed_data_creation: Created transient test student and temporary assignment/submissions during automated regression verification.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Validated on public URL from frontend/.env. Backend pytest (7 tests) passed for login/register/change-password, forgot-password queue pending_config behavior when provider disabled, OTP reset, WhatsApp provider settings roundtrip, review/revision status changes, and student resubmission under late-deadline rules. Playwright confirmed dashboard has no inline password card, header button opens password page, forgot-password reveals OTP/new-password fields, WhatsApp queue/history and retry are visible/clickable, grading page shows Dilihat/Revisi actions, and mobile student layout can access password page.
rca of the issue: No defect RCA required: all requested flows passed. Expected pending_config queue status observed when WhatsApp provider is disabled (configured behavior, not a bug).
